headline: UPS Pulls Driver Buyout Program in 13 States After Teamsters Pushback
summary: Union pressure forces a partial retreat, but UPS maintains the buyouts comply with the parties' national and regional contracts.

raw.headline: UPS Pulls Driver Buyout Program in 13 States After Teamsters Pushback
raw.summary: Union pressure forces a partial retreat, but UPS maintains the buyouts comply with the parties' national and regional contracts.

headline: Watch Planes, Trains & Automobiles for Crisis Clues
summary: ​ Follow our live markets data and coverage.  The S&P 500 is down by 5.8% and U.S. retail gasoline prices are about a third higher since the Iran conflict began.  Executives of most major companies and the Wall Street analysts who cover them have been either mum or just mildly concerned about the economic fallout.

headline: FedEx Stock (FDX) after Q3 — Not Cheap, but the Bull Case Persists
summary: FedEx (FDX) stock no longer looks as obviously cheap, especially compared to 2025 levels, but in my opinion, that’s not the right way to view the story today. The Memphis-based company has been pleasantly surprising in terms of earnings power visibility, confirmed by its latest Q3 earnings report, which included a revised upward guidance. headline: CNBC Daily Open: 'Period of destruction' paused after Iran's 'present'
summary: President Trump says he will extend a pause on Iranian energy attacks to April 6 after 10 ships were allowed passage through the Strait of Hormuz.
